name: Bank Of Sun Prairie
description_short: Bank of Sun Prairie is a community bank offering personal and business banking services including checking, savings, CDs, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates.
description_long:
Bank of Sun Prairie is a community-focused financial institution with its holding company, BOSP Bancshares, Inc., actively engaged in regional expansion. The bank recently completed an acquisition of Banner Bancorp, Ltd.'s ownership interest in Banner Banks in Birnamwood, Wisconsin, indicating growth and consolidation activity in their market. The institution positions itself as a traditional community bank committed to personalized service and local relationships.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal and business banking products. Personal services include checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with rates ranging from 3.25% to 3.50% APY, home loans, ATM and debit card access, and rewards accounts. Their debit card control features allow customers to turn cards on/off, control merchant access, and set spending limits. Business customers have access to commercial real estate loans, C&I (Commercial and Industrial) loans, SBA loans, business lines of credit, equipment leasing, and dedicated business cash management tools. The bank also offers Zelle for money transfers and Insured Cash Sweeps for FDIC protection on deposits over $250,000.

Bank of Sun Prairie distinguishes itself through emphasis on community engagement, reporting 5,016+ colleague volunteer hours in 2025. They provide financial education through their Financial Fitness Center covering topics like 401(k) optimization, budgeting, retirement planning, and small business growth. The bank actively markets competitive rates on CDs and savings products, positioning themselves as offering "best rates" compared to competitors. Their mobile app includes fraud protection and account control features, and they maintain active fraud awareness communications to protect customers from imposter schemes.

The bank operates as a traditional, full-service community bank rather than a niche lender. While comprehensive in offerings, they do not appear to specialize in credit repair, debt relief, or non-prime lending. As a regional community institution, availability may be geographically limited to their service areas, primarily Wisconsin-based on the Birnamwood acquisition and Sun Prairie location. Customers seeking nationwide online-only banking or specialized credit products may find better alternatives elsewhere. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Savings accounts and Certificates of Deposit (13-month and 24-month terms)
ATM and debit card access with control features
Credit cards with uChoose Rewards program
Personal and Business Online Banking platforms
Business lines of credit and equipment leasing
Insured Cash Sweeps for funds over $250,000
Financial education through Financial Fitness Center
pros: Competitive CD rates: 13-month CDs at 3.50% APY and 24-month CDs at 3.25% APY
Advanced debit card controls: Turn cards on/off, restrict merchants/locations, set spending limits via mobile app
Insured Cash Sweeps for FDIC protection on deposits exceeding $250,000
Multiple business lending options including commercial real estate, C&I, and SBA loans
Strong community engagement with 5,016+ volunteer hours reported in 2025
Free financial education through Financial Fitness Center covering retirement, budgeting, and business growth
Zelle integration for quick peer-to-peer money transfers via mobile
cons: Geographic limitation: Primarily operates in Wisconsin region, not a nationwide bank
No mention of online-only or digital banking options beyond mobile app; appears traditional branch-based
Limited information about personal loan products or consumer lending beyond mortgages and credit cards
No specific mention of competitive personal loan rates or terms on the website
Website does not detail ATM network access or surcharge-free ATM availability

contact.address: 228 E Main St, Sun Prairie, WI 53590

best_for: Wisconsin residents seeking community banking with personalized service and competitive CD rates
Small business owners needing commercial real estate financing, C&I loans, or SBA lending
Customers with deposits over $250,000 interested in FDIC protection via Insured Cash Sweeps
Consumers prioritizing debit card fraud control and account security features
diagnosis: Bank of Sun Prairie is best suited for Wisconsin-area residents and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with competitive rates on savings products and comprehensive business lending options. The main caveat is geographic limitation to their regional service areas and the traditional branch-based model, which may not appeal to customers prioritizing nationwide online-only banking convenience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 228 E Main St, Sun Prairie, WI 53590
meta_description: Bank of Sun Prairie is a community bank offering personal and business banking with checking, savings, and loans.
